pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility as intended by the migration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.xml.bind dependency with jakarta.xml.bind-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.xml.bind package was removed from the JDK in Java 11 and is not part of the standard Jakarta EE namespace used in modern Spring Boot 3.x applications targeting Java 21.
